character.name: Characters
character.description: Deep dives into guild members and their stories

darkness.name: The Veil
darkness.description: The darkness behind everything — The Veil saga

deepDives.title: RegginA: The Founder's Origin Story
deepDives.excerpt: Before the legend. Before NumbahWan. There was just a player with a dream and a really unfortunate naming sense.

deepDives.title: The Sacred Log Chronicles
deepDives.excerpt: The artifact that started a religion. Where did it come from? What powers does it hold?

deepDives.title: The Great AFK Incident of 2024
deepDives.excerpt: When half the guild went AFK during the most important raid in server history. The drama that followed...

deepDives.title: RegginO: The Vice Master's Secret
deepDives.excerpt: Always in RegginA's shadow. But what if... that's exactly where they want to be?

deepDives.title: THEORY: Is RegginA Actually an AI?
deepDives.excerpt: The evidence is mounting. The impossible play hours. The perfect optimization. We investigate.

deepDives.title: The Whale Wars
deepDives.excerpt: When two mega-spenders went to war over a limited banner. $50,000 was spent. Only one survived.

deepDives.title: The Forbidden Romance
deepDives.excerpt: Two guild members. Two rival factions. One secret relationship. The truth has never been told... until now.

deepDives.title: Natehouoho: From Zero to Hero
deepDives.excerpt: 12B+ CP. How one player grinded their way from the bottom to surpass even the founder.

deepDives.title: The Complete Guild Drama Timeline
deepDives.excerpt: Every beef, every betrayal, every questionable decision. Three years of chaos, documented.

deepDives.title: The Conspiracy Board
deepDives.excerpt: Connect the dots. Follow the strings. The truth is out there... probably.

deepDives.title: The Zakum Obsession
deepDives.excerpt: Why does RegginA wear a Zakum helmet? The answer goes deeper than you think.

deepDives.title: The Missing Members
deepDives.excerpt: Some guild members just... vanished. Where did they go? And why won't anyone talk about it?

deepDives.title: The Veil: The Darkness Behind Everything
deepDives.excerpt: Every boss was a puppet. Every dungeon was a feeding ground. Four primordial entities hunger in the void. The Order of the Eternal Ledger has operated for 1,200 years. The truth was always there.

deepDives.title: Luxarra, the Morning Blade — DLC 8
deepDives.excerpt: She doesn't attack. She offers. A being of impossible beauty with one wing of golden light and one of absolute void. Half the castle believes her. The guild splits.

deepDives.title: Malokh, the Brazen Maw — DLC 9
deepDives.excerpt: A 40-meter bronze automaton with a bull-skull head and a furnace where its heart should be. 200 players. One foundry. One god. Zero mercy.

deepDives.title: Kronomar, the Wheel-Father — DLC 10
deepDives.excerpt: He exists outside of time. His scythe doesn't kill — it rewinds. A time-loop boss fight that takes you through EVERY previous DLC simultaneously.

deepDives.title: The Ashen Mother — DLC 11: ANIMA
deepDives.excerpt: She cannot be damaged by weapons. She can only be weakened by acts of genuine kindness. The final boss of The Veil saga is beaten not by combat — but by making the world so good there's nothing left to feed on.

reggina-origin-hero.description: Epic hero banner for RegginA origin story
reggina-origin-hero.style: dramatic anime/game art, dark fantasy, fire effects
reggina-origin-hero.prompt: A powerful female warrior silhouette standing against a backdrop of flames, wearing a distinctive white mask (Zakum-style). The scene is dramatic with orange and purple gradients. Text area at bottom. Epic fantasy game art style with dark, moody atmosphere. 16:9 aspect ratio.

sacred-log-hero.style: fantasy artifact art, glowing effects, reverent atmosphere
sacred-log-hero.prompt: A simple wooden log floating in mid-air, surrounded by an ethereal golden glow. Mystical runes circle around it. Dark background with particles of light. The log should look ordinary but radiate importance. Fantasy game artifact style.

reggina-timeline-art.prompt: A horizontal timeline illustration showing a character's progression from a small, uncertain figure on the left to a powerful, confident leader on the right. Anime game art style. Each stage connected by flowing energy lines.

choiceSystem.description: Multiple choice questions that reveal character insights
